params.name: Arkanrock
params.description:
On Oct 19, 1191 AD, Richard the Lionheart severely defeated Saladin in the Battle of Arsuf and obtained this diamond.
This diamond, also called Heart of the Mountain, comes from Harrapa. The legend says that a dragon once swallowed this treasure. It was Ayyub, Saladin's ancestor, who found the diamond and gave it to Saladin. However, he later lost the treasure to Richard the Lionheart during the Crusades. [An associated poem] This round stone, reflecting thousands of faces of crystal light li …
